name: Dior Lip Glow Oil
description: The luxury lip oil that started the TikTok craze
summary: If you want the original viral lip oil that looks and feels luxurious, the Dior Lip Glow Oil is worth every penny of its premium price.

name: Rare Beauty Soft Pinch Tinted Lip Oil
description: Selena Gomez's brand delivers a lightweight tinted oil
summary: If you want a lip oil that gives real color payoff without feeling heavy, Rare Beauty nails the balance between gloss and tint.

name: NYX Fat Oil Lip Drip
description: The best drugstore Dior lip oil dupe
summary: If you want the viral lip oil look for under $10, the NYX Fat Oil is the best dupe out there. Seriously close to the Dior for a fraction of the price.

name: Clarins Lip Comfort Oil
description: The OG lip oil before TikTok made them cool
summary: Clarins was making lip oils before they were trendy. If you want a formula perfected over years with real skincare ingredients, this is it.

name: e.l.f. Glow Reviver Lip Oil
description: The $8 lip oil that went viral for being almost too good
summary: At $8 this is the cheapest viral lip oil and honestly it performs way above its price. Best budget pick, no contest.

name: Rhode Peptide Lip Tint
description: Hailey Bieber's peptide-infused lip tint oil hybrid
summary: If you follow skincare TikTok you already know about Rhode. The Peptide Lip Tint is genuinely good, not just celebrity hype.
